label: Grief
description: Loss and its aftermath.

label: Identity
description: The search for or construction of self.

label: Revenge
description: Retribution and its consequences.

label: Found Family
description: Belonging created through chosen bonds.

label: Corruption
description: The erosion of ideals or institutions.

label: Sacrifice
description: What someone gives up for another purpose.

label: Freedom
description: Liberation, agency, and constraint.

label: Ambition
description: The desire to rise, achieve, create, or be remembered.

label: Belonging
description: The need to be accepted and to find a place among others.

label: Betrayal
description: The wound created when trust, loyalty, or an oath is broken.

label: Coming of Age
description: The passage from one stage of life into greater self-knowledge and responsibility.

label: Community
description: The work of building, protecting, or transforming a shared way of life.

label: Duty
description: Obligation to a person, role, tradition, institution, or ideal.

label: Faith
description: Belief, doubt, devotion, and the search for meaning beyond certainty.

label: Free Will
description: The struggle between choice, destiny, conditioning, and responsibility.

label: Friendship
description: Loyalty, affection, and mutual care between people who choose one another.

label: Hope
description: The decision to imagine or pursue a better future despite evidence of loss.

label: Justice
description: The pursuit of fairness, accountability, and a righting of wrongs.

label: Legacy
description: What people inherit from the past and what they leave for those who follow.

label: Love
description: The bonds of affection, devotion, desire, and care that shape a life.

label: Memory
description: How remembering, forgetting, and revising the past shape identity.

label: Mortality
description: The limits of life and the choices made in the presence of death.

label: Nature
description: Human relationships with the living world and forces beyond human control.

label: Obsession
description: Desire that narrows attention until it becomes consuming or destructive.

label: Power
description: Who gets to decide, who must obey, and how authority changes people.

label: Prejudice
description: The personal and social damage caused by inherited bias and exclusion.

label: Redemption
description: The difficult attempt to repair harm and become worthy of trust again.

label: Responsibility
description: The consequences of having power, knowledge, privilege, or people who depend on you.

label: Survival
description: The instinct and ingenuity required to endure danger, scarcity, or oppression.

label: Technology
description: How tools and systems reshape human relationships, values, and possibilities.

label: Transformation
description: Physical, emotional, social, or spiritual change that makes a person unrecognizable.

label: Trauma
description: The lasting effects of harm and the work of living with or healing from it.

label: Truth
description: The cost of uncovering reality and deciding what to do with it.

label: Trust
description: The vulnerability of relying on another person and the labor of earning confidence.

label: Environmental Stewardship
description: The responsibility to care for ecosystems and the beings that depend on them.

label: Class
description: The influence of wealth, status, labor, and social mobility on human lives.

label: Displacement
description: The loss of home and the struggle to make a life somewhere new.

label: Isolation
description: Separation from community, intimacy, or the possibility of being understood.

label: Knowledge
description: The pursuit of understanding and the danger of learning what should remain hidden.

label: Religion
description: Institutions, rituals, doctrines, and personal beliefs that give a world meaning.

label: Reconciliation
description: The difficult process of making peace with another person, a community, or the past.
